title: Living in Boulder vlog 1 -  27 - 2018: Roman Colosseum Stairs

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder early in the morning, describing his progress building a 3D model of the Roman Colosseum in Google Earth, including reconstructing the staircase layout. He also discusses a self-made biweekly history study tool where he randomly selects decades to read about, and plans to finish the Colosseum model and possibly make a YouTube tour of it.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Thinks he can finish by Sunday but acknowledges a day off set him back
Wants to make one but suspects he'll delay it and move on to other projects first
Finds it genuinely fun and effective, like piecing together a puzzle
